mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TBL_COM_PLANT
USEYN = 1
AND PLANTNM LIKE #{search}
ORDER BY PLANTCD OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_PLANT ( PLANTCD, PAR_PLANTCD, PLANTNM, PLANTTYPE, ZIPCD, ADDR1, ADDR2, TEL, FAX, BUSINESSNO, BOSSNM, PERSON_CHARGE, BOSSTEL, USEYN, INFAILLOCCD, PRODFAILLOCCD, OUTFAILLOCCD, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{PLANTCD}, #{PAR_PLANTCD}, #{PLANTNM}, #{PLANTTYPE}, #{ZIPCD}, #{ADDR1}, #{ADDR2}, #{TEL}, #{FAX}, #{BUSINESSNO}, #{BOSSNM}, #{PERSON_CHARGE}, #{BOSSTEL}, #{USEYN}, #{INFAILLOCCD}, #{PRODFAILLOCCD}, #{OUTFAILLOCCD}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_PLANT SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE PLANTCD = #{PLANTCD}
